title: 1 step DFU - Language update when only CC has update
scenario: Verify that a 1-step DFU triggered by a language change correctly updates the Charge Case firmware and applies the selected language to the Charge Case UI when only the Charge Case has a pending firmware update.
steps: Ensure the Earbuds (EB) are on the latest firmware version.
Ensure the Charge Case (CC) has a pending firmware update available.
Initiate a 1-step DFU (Device Firmware Update) by changing the language setting.
Allow the DFU process to complete.
Verify that the Charge Case firmware has been updated to the latest version.
Verify that the selected language is applied to the Charge Case UI.
expected: The Charge Case firmware is updated to the latest version, and the selected language is correctly applied to the Charge Case UI.
